title: pseudognaphalium microcephalum var. thermale
intro: Pseudognaphalium microcephalum var. thermale is a variant of the Pseudognaphalium microcephalum plant species, commonly known as a type of Western Mugwort or Western Everlasting. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium microcephalum var. thermale include its use in treating wounds, skin irritations, and reducing fever, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of uses and potential interactions.
